lines.speaker: Nesty
lines.text: How can you not know? YOU MUST KNOW! It is of course the shrine!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... what is the purpose of said shrine?

lines.speaker: Nesty
lines.text: Do you not listen? It is the shrine to almighty one! BWAAAAAAAK!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, you're making me worried, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Nesty
lines.text: DO NOT defy him! Give him your eggs! So colourful! So beautiful!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm going to leave you alone now.
